core_principles: Generous spacing: Use p-4 to p-8 consistently to let content breathe, especially on mobile.
Tactile surfaces: Avoid flat grays. Use warm, stone-like off-whites and soft shadows.
High contrast typography: Espresso/charcoal text on warm sand backgrounds.
Masonry dominance: Pinterest-like feel for the discovery feed using CSS columns.
Mobile-first navigation: A sticky glassmorphism bottom tab bar.

typography.h1: text-4xl tracking-tighter font-outfit font-light text-[#2A2421] leading-none
typography.overline: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-outfit font-semibold text-[#C09473]

navigation_tab_bar.classes: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-t border-[#E6E2DC] pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center h-20

product_card.classes: break-inside-avoid mb-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-[0_2px_12px_rgba(42,36,33,0.04)] border border-[#E6E2DC]/50
product_card.brand_text: text-xs tracking-[0.1em] uppercase font-semibold text-[#756B61] mb-1

buttons.primary: w-full py-4 rounded-full bg-[#2A2421] text-white font-medium text-base hover:bg-[#1F1A18] transition-colors shadow-lg shadow-black/10 active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: w-full py-4 rounded-full bg-[#F3EFEA] text-[#2A2421] font-medium text-base hover:bg-[#E6E2DC] transition-colors active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.icon_action: h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center text-[#2A2421] shadow-sm

tags.budget: px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full bg-[#C09473]/10 text-[#A67B5B] text-xs font-semibold
tags.sustainability: px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full bg-[#5C7053]/10 text-[#5C7053] text-xs font-semibold

filters_sheet.classes: fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 z-50 bg-white rounded-t-3xl shadow-[0_-8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] p-6

chat_bubble.user: bg-[#F3EFEA] text-[#2A2421] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 max-w-[85%]
chat_bubble.ai: bg-white border border-[#E6E2DC] text-[#2A2421] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 max-w-[85%] shadow-sm

animation_and_motion.page_transition: framer-motion, initial opacity-0 y-4, animate opacity-100 y-0, duration 0.4s ease-out

testing.attributes: MUST include data-testid attribute on all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs, bottom bar actions).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a mobile-first responsive web app that feels like a native app. Keep max-width constraints on desktop to simulate a mobile frame (e.g. max-w-md mx-auto) or adapt to a split-pane layout.
Use CSS columns (columns-2 gap-4) for the Pinterest-style masonry grid.
Implement the bottom navigation bar as a fixed element with glassmorphism to emulate an app feel.
Ensure all Shadcn components (sheets, dialogs, inputs) are customized to match the Organic & Earthy archetype, avoiding default Vercel-like sharp edges and pure grays.
Use the provided media images to populate the fashion feed and beauty dashboard placeholders.
Integrate Lucide React icons with a light stroke-width (1.5) for elegance.
